name: feature-chat-panel
description: Create FeatureChatPanel component - chat interface using AI SDK useChat with tool call display via message.parts.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses @ai-sdk/react useChat hook for streaming chat
Accepts featureSessionId prop to scope chat to selected feature
Renders message list with user/assistant bubbles
Assistant messages render tool call parts using ToolCallPart component
Iterates message.parts and renders tool-* parts inline with text
Input textarea with send button, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
Auto-scrolls to bottom on new messages
Header shows linked feature session name
Uses useDomains().chat for message persistence via chatDomain
